MINI MINUTES: Seth Skootsky appearing for co-trustees Rachel, George and Robin Rehmet. Brian Connors appearing for objector Jacqueline Rehmet. Mr. Skootsky agreed to update the accounting. Mr. Connors wants a separate accounting. Mr. Skootsky will file a supplement to the 1st account and a separate 2nd accounting by 1/31/07. Matter is continued to 2/5/07 for status on filing of a supplement to the 1st account and a 2nd account. If both accounts are on filed, no appearance is required. Hearing on the accounts will be set when the accounts are filed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
